reviews.comment:
La atención es a media pila, gente que te atiende con cara de orto como sin ganas de hacer su trabajo,  ahora implementaron la venta de mini hamburguesas que la verdad son un fiasco,  si pasas por esta estación no te recomiendo consumirlas son mini mini y con sabor a nada..

(Translated by Google)
The service is mediocre, the staff serve you with a sour face, as if they have no desire to do their job. Now they've started selling mini hamburgers which are a complete disaster. If you're passing through this station, I don't recommend eating them; they're tiny and tasteless.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNNMDdteHJ3RRAB
